title: Cuneiform Tablet #0550: Early Dynastic School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
